name: Kalshi
facts: Raised $1B at $22B valuation from Coatue Management (March 19, 2026); doubled from $11B in December
Estimated ~$1.5B annualized revenue; valued at 14-15x revenue
CEO Tarek Mansour is backer of 5c(c) Capital, first dedicated prediction market VC fund
Regulated prediction market exchange (CFTC-regulated in the US)
Fined users $15K-$20K and issued multi-year bans for insider trading in early 2026
Uses institutional market makers (e.g., SIG) for tight spreads in high-volume categories
Launched builder program partnering with Twitter influencers
Part of the $13B monthly prediction market volume alongside Polymarket and PredictIt
Offers spot (1x) exposure only -- no leverage infrastructure
Potential future oracle source for LEVER Protocol
